overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a Japanese shrine area covered in vivid red maple leaves and white cherry blossoms. The character ascends stone stairs, passes through a torii gate marked 'OMI VILLAGE', and continues along a forest trail toward a distant village with rising smoke.

scene_state.functional_zone: shrine garden with red maple leaves and white cherry trees

events.description: character turns left toward the stone stairs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the red maple leaf-covered ground toward white cherry blossom trees

entered.detail: ground completely covered in vivid red fallen maple leaves
large cherry tree with full white blossom canopy
traditional Japanese stone lantern with mossy base
dark wooden post fence lining the path
red-leaved maple tree with branches extending over path
stone stairway leading upward into the trees

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks through a serene shrine garden where the ground is carpeted in vivid red maple leaves. White cherry blossom trees bloom in the distance against a clear blue sky, while traditional stone lanterns and wooden fences line the approach to a stone stairway.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway under dense cherry blossom canopy

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at cherry blossom canopy overhead

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs while surrounded by overhead cherry blossom canopy

entered.detail: dense overhead canopy of white cherry blossoms creating a tunnel effect
traditional wooden torii gate with moss-covered pillars visible at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a stone stairway enveloped by a dense canopy of white cherry blossoms that filters the sunlight. The camera tilts upward to capture the blossoms overhead as a traditional torii gate comes into view at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: shrine entrance path with torii gate

events.description: passing through the stone torii gate
location text 'OMI VILLAGE' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: walking through the torii gate and continuing along the stone path

entered.detail: irregular stone paving stones forming the walkway
tall moss-covered rock wall lining the left side of path
large boulders covered in green moss

segments.scene_description: Passing through the torii gate into Omi Village, the character walks along a stone path bordered by a mossy rock wall on the left and wooden fencing on the right. The dense cherry blossom canopy gives way to more open sky as the path transitions toward a forested area.

events.description: village with smoke plume comes into view through the trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the forest path toward the distant village

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through tall pine forest
tall evergreen pine trees creating dense forest walls
traditional Japanese village buildings visible in the valley below
dark smoke rising from the village in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to a dirt trail through a dense pine forest. As the character continues walking, a view opens up to reveal Omi Village in the valley below, with traditional rooftops visible and a plume of dark smoke rising into the sky, suggesting recent destruction or fire.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene, blossom-filled shrine garden toward a distant, smoke-shrouded village. It begins with the samurai walking across a ground carpeted in vivid red maple leaves, passing stone lanterns and wooden fences under a clear blue sky. As the character ascends a stone stairway, the camera tilts upward into a dense canopy of white cherry blossoms that filters the sunlight before reaching a traditional torii gate. The scene then opens as the character passes through the gate into Omi Village, moving along a stone path where the blossoms give way to a mossy rock wall and open sky. Finally, the path transitions into a dirt trail through a dense pine forest, eventually revealing a view of the village in the valley below with dark smoke rising from the rooftops.
